channel.title: Regulation on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Regulation on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: Demis Hassabis Calls for AI Watchdog
item.description: Demis Hassabis suggests a global AI watchdog led by the US to regulate AI development

item.title: How Anthropic's AI Warnings Might've Triggered Export Ban
item.description: FT analysis reveals Anthropic's frequent AI safety warnings may have led to US export restrictions on Mythos and Fable models.
